# gaugeProvider

**Instance Property**

The gauge provider for the template.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKGaugeProvider> @objc var gaugeProvider: CLKGaugeProvider { get set }
```

## Accessing the Content

- **centerTextProvider**: The text provider for the center text.
- **bottomLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
